title: Broad Bricks
body: Broad Bricks retextures all brick blocks that arent unique enough, and in a vanilla friendly way! This includes Deepslate Bricks, Tuff Bricks, Blackstone Bricks, Resin Bricks, and End Stone Bricks, as well as some of their chisled variants. (also Nether Bricks/Red Nether Bricks, just because they werent to my liking.)
